Commercial Cleaning in Newark, NJ

GreenPoint Maintenance Services provides MBE-certified commercial janitorial and facility maintenance across Newark and Essex County. Real-time cleaning verification through JaniTrack for schools, medical offices, churches, daycare centers, government buildings, and commercial offices.

Get an Instant Quote →Schedule Walkthrough
Newark Service Area

Industries We Serve in Newark

From K-12 schools to medical offices, our dedicated cleaning teams in Newark specialize in the specific compliance and hygiene requirements of each facility type.

✓
School Cleaning: CDC-compliant cleaning for K-12 schools, charter schools, private academies, and universities.
✓
Church Cleaning: Respectful, meticulous cleaning for sanctuaries, fellowship halls, nurseries, and administrative offices for congregations of all sizes.
✓
Medical Office Cleaning: OSHA-compliant terminal cleaning for medical offices, dental practices, outpatient clinics, urgent care centers, and long-term care facilities.
✓
Daycare Cleaning: Specialized cleaning for infant rooms, toddler areas, and play spaces using exclusively non-toxic, eco-friendly products approved for environments with children.
✓
Government Cleaning: Secure, reliable cleaning for government offices, courthouses, community centers, and public facilities.
✓
Office Cleaning: Comprehensive cleaning programs for single-tenant offices to multi-floor commercial properties including conference rooms, reception areas, and shared spaces.

Why Newark Facilities Trust GreenPoint

As a Certified Minority Business Enterprise headquartered in New York, we understand the unique demands of facilities in Newark, NJ. Our JaniTrack system provides real-time photo verification and ATP bioluminescence testing — giving you measurable proof that your facility meets clinical-grade cleanliness standards.
